pageSubtitleOwner: View and manage your pet grooming bookings
pageSubtitleGroomer: Manage your schedule and client appointments

serviceTypes.boardingNoPrice: Pricing follows the salon price list
serviceTypes.groomingBySize: Grooming length is set automatically from pet size

modifyWindowHint: *Reschedule/cancel isn’t available within 24 hours of the start time. Call or WhatsApp us if it’s urgent.*

empty.groomerNoUpcoming: You don’t have any upcoming appointments scheduled.
empty.groomerNoPast: You haven’t completed any appointments yet.
empty.ownerNoUpcoming: You don’t have any upcoming grooming appointments. Book one for your pet!
empty.ownerNoPast: You haven’t had any grooming appointments yet.
empty.petNoUpcomingLine1: {{name}} doesn’t have any upcoming appointments. It’s been
empty.petNoUpcomingLine2: days since their last grooming session.
empty.petNoPast: {{name}} hasn’t had any grooming appointments yet.

cancelDialog.title: Cancel appointment
cancelDialog.message: Cancel the appointment for {{pet}} on {{date}} at {{time}}?

toast.cancelledDesc: A confirmation has been sent to your email.
toast.cancelFailedDesc: Please try again or contact the salon.

groomerManualBooking.title: Manual booking
groomerManualBooking.subtitle: Phone or walk-in — same slot checks as online booking.
groomerManualBooking.sourceOnlineHint: Customer booked online; you’re recording it
groomerManualBooking.petOptionalHint: You can leave this blank for a quick walk-in booking.
groomerManualBooking.walkInSizeHint: If no pet is selected, pick a size so we can block the right grooming length.
groomerManualBooking.fillAll: Choose service, date, and time slot
groomerManualBooking.toastCreatedDesc: Your calendar will refresh to show it

validation.petSize: Please set your pet’s size in their profile first

modal.termsDialogSubtitle: Please read before submitting (same text as our grooming policy page)
modal.boardingSlotHint: Check-in is fixed at 11:00 on the selected day and check-out at 17:00 the next day (Malaysia time). No time slot to pick.
modal.noSlots: No slots on this date — try another day.
modal.slotConflictFriendly: This time slot is already booked. Please choose another.
modal.instructionsHint: Groomers will see this; it’s saved to your pet profile.
modal.policyCancel: Cancellations and reschedules aren’t available within 24 hours of the start time.
modal.policyLate: Please be on time — we allow a 10-minute grace period.
modal.policyHealth: Pets should be vaccinated and free of fleas and ticks.
modal.toastEmailDesc: We’ve emailed a confirmation with your booking reference.
modal.serviceDescriptionBasic: Bathing, drying, brushing, nail clipping, ear cleaning, anal gland expression
modal.serviceDescriptionFull: Full style and trim plus every basic grooming step

staff.cancelConfirm: Cancel this appointment? The slot will be freed for others.
staff.toastCancelledDesc: The slot is free again; your lists will refresh.

calendarPage.title: Calendar
calendarPage.subtitle: See appointments and block time when you’re unavailable.
calendarPage.loadError: Couldn’t load schedule. Please try again.
calendarPage.hintBlocks: Click blocked slots to manage them
calendarPage.hintViews: Switch Month, Week, or Day with the view buttons
calendarPage.featNav: Use arrows to move through dates, or Today to jump back.
calendarPage.featCreate: Use Block time or drag on the calendar to add blocks.
calendarPage.featDelete: Tap red blocks to view, edit, or remove them.
calendarPage.featAppts: Blue = confirmed, amber = in progress, green = completed. Tap for details.
calendarPage.featHours: Grey areas are outside business hours. We’re closed on Wednesdays.

timeBlock.createSubtitle: Mark yourself unavailable for new bookings
timeBlock.ruleNoBook: New appointments won’t be booked in this window.
timeBlock.ruleDelete: You can remove blocks later by tapping them on the calendar.
timeBlock.ruleRecurring: Repeating blocks are added for the days you pick until the end date.
timeBlock.toastPickRecurringDay: Pick at least one weekday for repeats
timeBlock.toastPickEndDate: Pick an end date for repeats
timeBlock.toastTimeOrder: Start time must be before end time
timeBlock.toastPast: Can’t create blocks in the past

detail.basicDesc: Bath, brush, nail trim, ears, and essentials
detail.fullDesc: Full style plus everything in basic grooming
detail.boardingDesc: Overnight boarding (fixed check-in and check-out times)

petDetail.notesHint: Groomers see this when you book.
petDetail.notesEmpty: No notes yet — tap Edit notes to add some.
petDetail.noHistoryBody: Book {{name}}’s first groom to start the story!
petDetail.avatarHint: Upload JPG/PNG/WEBP up to 5MB. It updates immediately after upload.
petDetail.avatarUploadFailed: Couldn’t upload avatar. Please try again.
petDetail.avatarInvalidType: Only JPG, PNG, or WEBP images are supported.
petDetail.avatarTooLarge: Image is too large. Please keep it within 5MB.

petForm.name: Pet name
petForm.avatarHint: JPG / PNG / WEBP, max 5MB. You can skip now and upload later.
petForm.avatarInvalidType: Only JPG, PNG, or WEBP images are supported.
petForm.avatarTooLarge: Image is too large. Please keep it within 5MB.
petForm.notesPh: Allergies, habits, preferences… you can edit this when booking too.
